seo.title: Terms of Service | William Entriken
seo.description: Terms and conditions for using WilliamEntriken.net.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Welcome to WilliamEntriken.net. By accessing and using this website, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.
If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use this website.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual Property Rights
paragraphs: The content on WilliamEntriken.net, including texts, graphics, images, and logos, is owned by William Entriken or used under fair use.
It is protected by copyright laws and treaties around the world. All rights are reserved.
You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or use the content without prior written consent from William Entriken.

sections.title: 3. User Responsibilities
paragraphs: You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the website complies with all local, national, or international laws and regulations.
You must also ensure that all information you provide on the website is accurate and truthful.

sections.title: 4. User Content
paragraphs: You may be able to submit content to the website.
You retain all rights to any content you submit, but you grant us a license to use, store, and copy that content and to distribute and make it available to third parties.
We reserve the right to remove any content at our discretion.

sections.title: 5. Confidentiality of Submissions
paragraphs: We treat information submitted via forms on this website with care and consider it private.
However, we are not liable for breaches of confidentiality caused by unauthorized acts of third parties or through no fault of our own.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: William Entriken will not be liable for unauthorized access to, or use of, personal data or any damages arising from your use of the site.
No guarantees are made concerning the security, reliability, or timeliness of responses to submissions made through the site.

sections.title: 7. Purchases and Advisory Retainer Plans
paragraphs: Purchases of advisory retainer plans without prior discussion are subject to unilateral rejection and refunds at the discretion of William Entriken.

sections.title: 8. Right to Reject Projects
paragraphs: William Entriken reserves the right to accept or reject any projects or interactions in his sole discretion, without explanation.

sections.title: 9. Press Images
paragraphs: Images on the press page are licensed under Creative Commons 4 and may be used freely by the press for lawful purposes.

sections.title: 10. No Endorsements
paragraphs: Mention of projects derived from or related to William Entriken's work does not constitute an endorsement or affiliation with those projects.

sections.title: 11. Use of AI Tools and Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The "Ask your AI" feature is provided only as a convenience to open third-party AI providers through deeplinks.
Any use of third-party providers, including ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity, is solely between you and the applicable provider under that provider's own terms, privacy policy, and practices.
We not track, store, keep records of, or receive notifications about any conversations you have with those providers.
We are not responsible for your use of those third-party services, including any claims, losses, disputes, outputs, or actions that occur on or because of those services.
We are not sponsored by, affiliated with, or paid by those providers for including these links.

sections.title: 12. Changes to Terms of Service
paragraphs: These terms may be amended or updated from time to time to reflect changes in practices or changes in law.
You are encouraged to review these terms regularly.

sections.title: 13. Governing Law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Pennsylvania, without regard to its conflict-of-law principles.
